name: Conductor — First Contact
summary: The Conductor stands in the forward doorway as the investigator enters Carriage 4. He does not speak on this pass.
narrative_beats: At the far end of the carriage, the forward door is open.
A figure stands in it. Tall. Uniform. The cap is pulled low.
The silhouette does not shift with the Train's rocking.
You take a step toward him. He does not move away.
You take a step back. He does not follow.
The Train enters a bend. When it straightens, the doorway is empty.
consequences_if_passed: Investigator can describe what they saw if asked later.
Conductor will speak to them in Carriage 2 when reached.
consequences_if_failed: A name surfaces in the investigator's throat and sinks again.
On a 5+ SAN loss, an INT check for temporary insanity; the silhouette may persist at the edge of vision for the next scene.
